name: Impossible Southwestern Pie
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Black beans, rinse and drain
1/2 cup Bisquick reduced fat or original baking mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch glass pie plate.
3. Layer corn, onions, and beans in the pie plate.
4. Sprinkle cheese over the vegetables.
5. In a bowl, stir together baking mix, milk, 1/2 cup salsa, and eggs until well combined.
6. Pour the mixture evenly over the layered vegetables in the pie plate.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving with additional salsa.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
